title: Dependency install fails because the agent sandbox blocks network access
primary_answer_query: Dependency install fails because the agent sandbox blocks network access

answer_summary.problem: dependency installation fails with DNS, host resolution, registry, index, TLS, or timeout errors
answer_summary.root_cause: The package manager needs external network access but the agent sandbox blocks it by default.
answer_summary.fix: Classify the error as network-related before changing dependency manifests.
answer_summary.verification: Re-run the same command after approved network access.

title: Claude Agent SDK does not load .mcp.json unless settingSources includes "project"
primary_answer_query: SDK doesnt read from .mcp.json until the CLI is run in the cwd

answer_summary.problem: the SDK reports no MCP servers even though .mcp.json is in the working directory
answer_summary.root_cause: The Agent SDK does not auto-load project/user/local settings from disk; it loads them only when settingSources is set.
answer_summary.fix: Pass settingSources including 'project' (and 'user'/'local' as needed) when constructing the SDK query so .mcp.json is read.
answer_summary.verification: Inspect mcpServerStatus() / the mcp_servers field on first SDK launch.

answer_summary.root_cause: The desktop app persists workspace roots separately from the shell current directory, and those saved roots may not update when a folder is moved.

primary_answer_query: Docker port is published but localhost refuses the connection

answer_summary.problem: docker ps or docker port shows the expected host port
answer_summary.root_cause: The app inside the container is listening on loopback rather than a container network interface.
answer_summary.fix: Change the app bind address inside the container to 0.0.0.0.

title: FastMCP returns 421 Invalid Host Header behind a proxy due to DNS rebinding protection
primary_answer_query: Guide: Resolving '421 Invalid Host Header' DNS Rebinding Protection

answer_summary.problem: all external requests fail with HTTP 421 Misdirected Request and 'Invalid Host header'
answer_summary.root_cause: FastMCP enables DNS rebinding protection that validates the request Host header against an allowed list (added in PR #861).
answer_summary.fix: Explicitly allow your hosts and origins via TransportSecuritySettings(allowed_hosts=[...], allowed_origins=[...]).
answer_summary.verification: Send a proxied request after setting allowed_hosts or disabling protection.

title: FastMCP overrides your app's logging configuration on init (duplicate or lost logs)
primary_answer_query: Option to not rewrite the logging configuration workarounds: re-apply dictConfig, remove added handler

answer_summary.problem: log messages become duplicated after the FastMCP server is created
answer_summary.root_cause: FastMCP performs global logging configuration at startup (configure_logging) instead of confining itself to its own logger.
answer_summary.fix: Re-apply your logging configuration after constructing FastMCP so your handlers win.
answer_summary.verification: Emit logs after re-applying your config.

title: VS Code agent config: github/* MCP toolset is Unknown tool while github warns it's renamed
primary_answer_query: VSCode Toolset name mismatch: github/* fails with Unknown tool, but github warns its deprecated

answer_summary.problem: 'tools': ['github/*'] produces Unknown tool
answer_summary.root_cause: The server/* toolset alias resolves only when the MCP server is registered under the matching name (e.g. installed via the official flow so it is named github).
answer_summary.fix: Use the name that resolves for your setup: if github/* is Unknown tool, use 'github' and ignore the rename warning for now.
answer_summary.verification: Run the agent with the chosen tools entry.

title: macOS PortAudio/sounddevice records all-zero silent audio with no error when the default mic is unavailable
primary_answer_query: macOS PortAudio/sounddevice records all-zero silent audio with no error when the default mic is unavailable

answer_summary.problem: multi-second speech transcribes to a single junk token (e.g. 6.2s clip -> '我。', stray Korean '그.', or '谷歌')
answer_summary.root_cause: With the lid closed (clamshell), the built-in MacBook mic is physically unavailable but is still enumerated AND still selected as the default input device.
answer_summary.fix: Diagnose by measuring the recorded level, not by trusting the API: 0 == silent capture.
answer_summary.verification: After pinning to the Studio Display mic, measure the recorded peak and run ASR.

title: MCP server hangs because the GUI client uses your user-level .npmrc, not your project's
primary_answer_query: author resolved 'Client closed' by fixing an incorrect registry in user-level ~/.npmrc that the project .npmrc had overridden in the terminal

answer_summary.problem: npx -y <package> works in a project terminal but not when launched by the client
answer_summary.root_cause: npm merges config from multiple .npmrc files; the project-level file only applies when the working directory is inside that project.
answer_summary.fix: Inspect effective npm config and the user-level rc file.
answer_summary.verification: Relaunch from the client after fixing ~/.npmrc.

answer_summary.problem: Windows only: a file under an allowed directory returns 'Error: Access denied - path outside allowed directories'
answer_summary.root_cause: The allowed-directory check compares request paths against allowed roots as strings.

title: Remote MCP OAuth fails with "does not support dynamic client registration"; use a PAT
primary_answer_query: Claude Code cannot connect to GitHubs remote MCP server using OAuth authentication PAT via GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN is the confirmed workaround

answer_summary.problem: claude mcp add ... https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ then the connection fails
answer_summary.root_cause: The client's OAuth flow relies on OAuth 2.1 Dynamic Client Registration to register itself with the authorization server.
answer_summary.fix: Create a fine-grained GitHub Personal Access Token with the scopes you need.
answer_summary.verification: Connect after providing the PAT in env.

title: MCP Inspector in Docker refuses connections unless HOST and ALLOWED_ORIGINS are set
primary_answer_query: Docker container connection refused HOST + ALLOWED_ORIGINS workaround

answer_summary.problem: curl http://localhost:6274 returns Failed to connect ... Connection refused
answer_summary.root_cause: Inspector listens on the loopback interface, which inside a container is only reachable by processes in that container.
answer_summary.fix: Pass HOST and ALLOWED_ORIGINS to the container run command.
answer_summary.verification: Curl the UI port after setting the env vars.

title: MCP Inspector breaks after an upgrade; pin a known-good version
primary_answer_query: sh: mcp-inspector: command not found after upgrading to v0.10.0 downgrade to 0.9.0

answer_summary.problem: npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector fails with 'sh: mcp-inspector: command not found' or ''mcp-inspector' is not recognized' (0.10.0)
answer_summary.root_cause: Inspector is released often and some releases regress.
answer_summary.fix: Pin a known-good version to unblock, e.g. @0.9.0 for the 0.10.0 command-not-found regression or @0.16.7 for the 0.17.2 Controller-already-closed regression.
answer_summary.verification: Run the pinned or fixed version.

answer_summary.problem: puppeteer_screenshot reports success but no image file appears on disk
answer_summary.root_cause: The server stores screenshots in memory and exposes them as MCP resources, with no documented filesystem path.

title: A reverse proxy buffering SSE breaks remote MCP after OAuth and initialize succeed
primary_answer_query: Claude Desktop custom MCP connection failure; confirmed root cause is Cloudflare Tunnel buffering SSE despite successful OAuth/initialize

answer_summary.problem: the client connects to a custom remote MCP then errors (e.g. 'There was an error connecting to your server')
answer_summary.root_cause: MCP Streamable HTTP streams responses over SSE, which must be flushed incrementally.
answer_summary.fix: Disable response buffering for the MCP endpoint at the proxy.
answer_summary.verification: Connect through the proxy and watch the stream.

title: server-memory ignores MEMORY_FILE_PATH because the npm build lagged the source

answer_summary.problem: MEMORY_FILE_PATH is set but the memory file is created at a default location
answer_summary.root_cause: The npm release (e.g. 0.6.2) was older than the GitHub main source: its compiled dist/index.js hardcoded path.join(__dirname, 'memory.json').
answer_summary.fix: Pin @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory@latest in the config to get the build that honors the env var (fix shipped in release 2025.4.25).
answer_summary.verification: Launch with @latest and an absolute MEMORY_FILE_PATH, then check where the file is written.

title: SSE MCP server: Received request before initialization was complete
primary_answer_query: MCP SSE Server: Received request before initialization was complete comment confirms supergateway double-initialize; mcp-proxy works

answer_summary.problem: server raises RuntimeError: Received request before initialization was complete on tools/list or a tool call
answer_summary.root_cause: The MCP lifecycle requires the client's initialize to complete before other requests.
answer_summary.fix: If a gateway/proxy is in front, use a spec-compliant one: switching supergateway -> mcp-proxy resolves the double-initialize case.
answer_summary.verification: Use a compliant proxy or reconnect the client, then call tools/list.

title: MCP SSE session lost across workers/pods: Could not find session for ID (404)
primary_answer_query: MCP Server Session Lost in Multi-Worker Environment comments confirm stateless_http=True and ingress sticky-hash fixes

answer_summary.problem: SSE connection opens (200), first POST returns 202, later POSTs return 404
answer_summary.root_cause: The SSE transport is stateful: the session lives in the memory of the worker/pod that accepted the SSE connection.
answer_summary.fix: Preferred: run stateless with Streamable HTTP so no per-connection in-memory session is required.
answer_summary.verification: Send repeated messages on one session under a multi-instance deployment after the change.

title: Stateless Streamable HTTP MCP server throws anyio.ClosedResourceError on some SDK versions
primary_answer_query: _handle_stateless_request ClosedResourceError reports 1.11.0 works, 1.12.0 fails; also FastMCP 2.10/2.13

answer_summary.problem: each request raises an exception group ending in anyio.ClosedResourceError
answer_summary.root_cause: In affected versions the stateless Streamable HTTP path re-enters the transport's read loop.
answer_summary.fix: Pin a known-good SDK version; users reported 1.11.0 working where 1.12.0 failed.
answer_summary.verification: Send repeated requests to the stateless server on the pinned/fixed version.

answer_summary.root_cause: GUI clients launch MCP servers without sourcing the user's shell config, so the child gets a minimal PATH.

title: mcp-server-time crashes when the local timezone is an abbreviation like EDT/PDT/CEST
primary_answer_query: Time server fails under EDT timezone use --local-timezone with an IANA name

answer_summary.problem: uvx mcp-server-time traceback through zoneinfo/_common.py load_tzdata failing to load the timezone
answer_summary.root_cause: The server resolves the local timezone, but the platform reports a non-IANA abbreviation (e.g. EDT).
answer_summary.fix: Pass an explicit IANA timezone with --local-timezone.
answer_summary.verification: Start the server with an explicit IANA timezone.

title: MCP TypeScript client times out long tool calls after 60s (-32001) unless you reset on progress
primary_answer_query: mcp client times out after 60 seconds (ignoring timeout option); comments confirm callTool request options and resetTimeoutOnProgress

answer_summary.problem: McpError: MCP error -32001: Request timed out with data: { timeout: 60000 }
answer_summary.root_cause: The default per-request timeout is 60000 ms.
answer_summary.fix: Pass request options as the third argument to callTool with a larger timeout and resetTimeoutOnProgress: true.
answer_summary.verification: Run a tool call that exceeds 60 seconds with the options set.

title: MCP TS SDK validation fails on Cloudflare Workers with EvalError (AJV code generation)
primary_answer_query: Elicitation feature fails on Cloudflare Workers due to AJV code generation EvalError

answer_summary.problem: EvalError: Code generation from strings disallowed for this context, with a stack through new Function and Ajv.localCompile
answer_summary.root_cause: The SDK validates JSON Schema with AJV v6, which generates validator code at runtime via new Function.
answer_summary.fix: On Cloudflare, use the McpAgent integration that added elicitation support; call elicitation on the McpAgent class, not mcpServer.server.
answer_summary.verification: Run the validation/elicitation path on the edge runtime.

title: MCP TypeScript SDK breaks with Zod v4: w._parse is not a function
primary_answer_query: MCP SDK v1.17.5 Incompatible with Zod v4 - Breaking Changes

answer_summary.problem: tool execution returns {"code":-32603,"message":"w._parse is not a function..."}
answer_summary.root_cause: MCP SDK versions up to ~1.17.5 declare zod ^3.x and call Zod internal API (_def, _parse).

title: On Windows an MCP server launched with npx needs a cmd /c wrapper
primary_answer_query: Windows npx launch failure with garbled 'not recognized' error -32000

answer_summary.problem: Windows only: the MCP server will not start
answer_summary.root_cause: On Windows npx and npm are npx.cmd / npm.cmd batch files, not executables.
answer_summary.fix: Launch through cmd: set command to 'cmd' and args to ['/c','npx','-y','<package>', ...].
answer_summary.verification: Relaunch after wrapping with cmd /c.

title: PortAudio stream stop()/close() on a hotkey-callback thread can freeze the global hotkey listener
primary_answer_query: PortAudio stream stop()/close() on a hotkey-callback thread can freeze the global hotkey listener

answer_summary.problem: a push-to-talk dictation daemon intermittently goes unresponsive after switching windows and dictating
answer_summary.root_cause: stop()/close() of a PortAudio stream on a flaky/display-connected device can block for a long time.
answer_summary.fix: Move recorder.stop() (the PortAudio stream.stop()/close() calls) AND all downstream processing off the pynput key-release callback thread into a background thread.
answer_summary.verification: Use the daemon heavily across multiple windows after the change.

title: pynput Controller.type() scrambles mixed Chinese+English text on macOS; use clipboard paste
primary_answer_query: pynput Controller.type() scrambles mixed Chinese+English text on macOS; use clipboard paste

answer_summary.problem: injecting '打开Claude Code，然后commit一下。' yields '打开ClaudeC，然后一下。odecomit' — reordered, English fragments shoved to the end, some CJK dropped
answer_summary.root_cause: On macOS pynput types CJK characters via synthesized Unicode events and ASCII via key events.
answer_summary.fix: Switch text injection from per-character keyboard.type() to clipboard paste: copy the full string via pbcopy, then simulate Cmd+V.
answer_summary.verification: Inject the same mixed Chinese+English sentence after the change.

title: uv fails in a managed workspace because cache or Python install paths are outside writable roots
primary_answer_query: uv fails in a managed workspace because cache or Python install paths are outside writable roots

answer_summary.problem: uv run or uv sync fails with permission or sandbox filesystem errors
answer_summary.root_cause: uv defaults to cache or interpreter directories outside the agent's writable roots.
answer_summary.fix: Set UV_CACHE_DIR to a workspace-local directory.
answer_summary.verification: Run a small uv command with local paths.
